calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Michael Mandel, Esq. for Plaintiff: Carlos Cortes, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter submitted and taken under submission.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): ------------------------ as follows:
Damages
Costs $.00, for a total of $
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
